{{Quote|TK-664, what is your status? TK-664, Report!|Unidentified Imperial officer|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>}}
'''TK-664''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He was stationed at the [[Cairn Installation]] and was killed by [[Kyle Katarn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
